name: Open Second Brain
description: Second brain for AI agents using Obsidian-compatible Markdown vaults.

vault.description: Absolute path to the Obsidian-compatible vault directory.

instanceName.description: Human-readable name for this second brain instance.

agentName.description: Identity used in Brain/log/*.md event log entries (e.g. 'openclaw-main'). Falls back to VAULT_AGENT_NAME env, then to '@agent'.

timezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. 'Europe/Belgrade', 'America/New_York', 'UTC') used to stamp Brain/log/*.md entries in the user's local time. Falls back to VAULT_TIMEZONE env, then to the host's local clock.

mcpEnabled.description: Whether to also expose an MCP stdio server (optional).

vault.label: Vault Path
vault.help: Absolute path to the Obsidian-compatible vault directory.

instanceName.label: Instance Name
instanceName.help: Human-readable name for this second brain instance.

agentName.label: Agent Name
agentName.help: Identity used in Brain/log/*.md as @agent-name for event log entries.

timezone.label: Timezone
timezone.help: IANA timezone name (e.g. Europe/Belgrade) for HH:MM stamps in Brain/log/*.md.

mcpEnabled.label: Enable MCP Server
mcpEnabled.help: Expose Open Second Brain as an MCP stdio server (optional).
